title: April 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Citation}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 1''' is the 91st day of the year (92nd in leap years), with 274 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[John Barbata]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Steven Knight]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[James Robinson]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Troy Baker]] is born.
*1976 – [[David Oyelowo]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' published.
*[[1982]] – [[Taran Killam]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Matt Lanter]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 8|''Ewoks'' (1985) 8]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[The Last Command]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']] published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 8|''Classic Star Wars'' 8]] published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' is published.
*1994 – [[Classic Star Wars 18|''Classic Star Wars'' 18]] is published.
*[[1995]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 3]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'' published.
*1996 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 7]] published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Planet Plague]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 2|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 2]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]'' published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 18|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 18]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine (TPB)|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine'' trade paperback]] published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 29|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 29]] published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]''
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' published.
*2001 – [[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]] is published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' paperback published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 15]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 87|''Star Wars Insider'' 87]] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Padawan Lost]]" and "[[Wookiee Hunt]]" air on Cartoon Network.
*[[2012]] – "[[An Apology]]" published.
*[[2015]] – [[Kanan 1|''Kanan'' 1]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] released on digital HD and Disney Movies.
*[[2019]] – [[Vonda N. McIntyre]] dies.
*2019 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars Insider 196|''Star Wars Insider'' 196]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[The High Republic: Into the Light]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Bloodline (novel)|''Bloodline'']] reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Lords of the Sith]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[Master & Apprentice]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2025 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia Updated Edition]]'' published.

<noinclude>
In many countries, April 1 is known as [[Wikipedia:April Fool's Day|April Fool's Day]]. [[StarWars.com]] has often posted practical jokes on this day, including:
*[[2001]] – [https://web.archive.org/web/20080629163821/http://www.starwars.com/episode-v/bts/article/f20010401/401 April 1, 1979 Main Page], a "preview" of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] is titled ''The Creeping Fear'' in the site navigational menus.
*[[2006]] – [https://web.archive.org/web/20080624031742/http://starwars.com/databank/updates/401/news20060401.html The Shadow War Chronicles] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] update, based on the film [[Willow (film)|''Willow'']].
*[[2010]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' announces a new class: [[Sarlacc Enforcer]].
[[Wookieepedia]] has also manipulated the appearance of the wiki on April 1.
